name: Sandbox Vite Games
description: Build playable sandbox web apps, Vite-style previews, browser games, simulations, and multi-step interactive frontends through project-mode files, preview lifecycle controls, game-loop state, assets, browser QA, and iteration.

chain.step: Classify the request as a playable app/game/simulation or a multi-step Vite-style frontend
Gather design or gameplay references only when genre, controls, or visual language are under-specified
Create or source needed bitmap/SVG assets when the game or app needs subject-specific visuals
Build a previewable project bundle with index.html plus CSS, JS modules, fixtures, and assets
Run desktop and mobile browser QA, checking nonblank canvas/rendering, controls, restart, responsive layout, and console errors
Refine gameplay feel, state transitions, layout, performance, and readable UI after the first preview
